contentPattern.structure: N repeating bordered cards, each circular icon + title heading + single 'Learn More' CTA button (no description, no photo)

suitableFor: navigation / hub card grids linking to sub-pages (icon + title + single CTA button)
topic launchers where each card routes to an article
notSuitableFor: icon + title + description + contact action (use cards-support)
icon + short single-line text with no CTA (use cards-sunnah)
